alert-description.label: Alert conditions are checked from top to bottom, so you should order them from most specific to least specific. Additionally, if multiple images, videos, or sounds are added to an alert, a random one is chosen.

follow-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
follow-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

raid-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
raid-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

reward-text.label: Alert Text
reward-text.description:
{username} - User Name
{reward} - Channel Point Reward Name
{amount} - Reward Cost
{message} - User Redeem Message

reward-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
reward-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

global-description.label: These options will be applied to all alerts.
